focus: Interface transformation and pre-build direction cluster: bolder/quieter/shape/distill/clarify/craft plus Codex visual-direction gates crosswalked onto sk-design interface, audit transform remediation, shared register, real-UI loop, and content gate.

graphEvents.label: sk-design interface real-UI loop and pre-build direction gate
sk-design copy and mock data content gate

label: Guarded compact brief confirmation before implementation for open-ended high-fi or production-ready interface work
evidence: Current sk-design has a two-pass plan-build process and optional pre-build direction gate, but no explicit compact brief confirmation pause for open-ended high-fi work.

label: Native image-generation palette/mock gate plus mock ingredient inventory before code
evidence: Current real_ui_loop allows optional sketching before build and checks fidelity after render, but does not encode palette-first confirmation, approved mock direction, or ingredient inventory.

label: Localization expansion and terminology glossary check for interface copy
evidence: Current content gate covers one register, stable action names, copy sweeps and grounded data, but not translation expansion or translator context.

label: Bolder, quieter and distill transformation commands already map to register-gated transform remediation
evidence: Transform remediation already owns the four verbs, register gate, owner routing, and accepted remediation path.

label: Craft build pipeline, framework selection, asset-producer subagent mechanics, and distill code cleanup do not belong in sk-design
evidence: sk-design owns direction and handoff; implementation mechanics route to sk-code and workflow-specific tooling.

direction: Create a new sk-design shape or craft mode
reason: The useful material fits existing interface and real-UI loop ownership; no distinct output owner emerges.

direction: Adopt exact bolder/quieter numeric recipes as hard style rules
reason: sk-design's register and dials already calibrate intensity; exact recipe numbers would become style presets.
Mock ingredient inventory is design-methodology value; subagent and output-directory mechanics are workflow infrastructure.
